title: Faithful: PAEBrightness param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 6.0 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEBrightness must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEBrightness to range extremes across hosts ['Objects__Curtains'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=6.00 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEBrightness implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEBrightness` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "brightness", "theta": 100.0, "t": 0.9, "oracle_signal": 134.118, "ddb": 6.004}, {"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "brightness", "theta": 50.0, "t": 0.9, "oracle_signal": 114.194, "ddb": 7.333}, {"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "brightness", "theta": 100.0, "t": 0.75, "oracle_signal": 134.118, "ddb": 8.739}, {"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "brightness", "theta": 100.0, "t": 0.5, "oracle_signal": 122.01, "ddb": 10.111}, {"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "brightness", "theta": 50.0, "t": 0.75, "oracle_signal": 114.343, "ddb": 10.576}, {"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "brightness", "theta": 100.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 84.326, "ddb": 11.77}]
